title: Cornerstone Roadmap — open work by workstream

nodes.label:
✅ Lineup Engine v2
(milestone done)
nodes.description: All 7 issues closed: lineup-aware Formula Handlers, category rollup, PnR Ball Handler trait, tier retune 0/1/4/8/16, off/def rebounding split.

nodes.label:
✅ Snapshot Version Publishing
(milestone ~done)
nodes.description: Draft lifecycle, review queue, subset pipeline, publish gates, changelog — shipped. 3 stragglers remain (#86, #85, #51).

nodes.label:
✅ Lab UI/UX Improvements
(milestone ~done)
nodes.description: Team Shape glyphs, attribution ledger, eval-impact preview, score animation, drilldowns, Save & Publish ceremony (#94 — commit moment: restated eval, version pins, visibility choice, sealed copy) — shipped. 1 open (#100).

nodes.label:
🧍 #86 Giannis Elite OReb
regression (Snapshot, P1 bug)
nodes.description: Giannis shows Elite Offensive Rebounder; re-running the pipeline today changes results. Reproducibility bug in the stat→skill pipeline. Waiting on human.

nodes.label:
🧍 #85 Missing input nulls
a rating (Snapshot, P2 bug)
nodes.description: Movement Shooter (and likely others): a missing stat input nulls the whole rating instead of degrading gracefully. Waiting on human.

nodes.label:
#51 pipeline_runs retention
(TTL or archival)
nodes.description: pipeline_runs table grows unbounded — pick TTL or archival policy. Agent-ready.

nodes.label:
🧍 #100 Player passing composite
(Lab, P2)
nodes.description: Earn collective_passing its Team Shape spoke — needs a player-level passing composite first. Waiting on human.

nodes.label:
🧍 #95 Lineup viability threshold
investigation (P2 chore)
nodes.description: Plausible rotations score 0/1 viable — threshold likely miscalibrated. Investigation, waiting on human.

nodes.label:
#81 Claude pipeline off the
request path (P2 refactor)
nodes.description: Move the Claude skill-evaluation pipeline to background execution instead of blocking requests. Agent-ready.

nodes.label:
🧍 #80 Decouple scores from
LLM narrative (P2)
nodes.description: Deterministic scores return immediately; narrative generated async. Waiting on human.

nodes.label:
#79 Cache cohesion team
narratives (P2)
nodes.description: Cache narratives keyed on player-set + ruleset version — avoids re-paying Claude for identical rosters. Agent-ready.

nodes.label:
#58 M2 backend refactors
(P3, deferred)
nodes.description: Backend refactors deferred from the M2 review-fanout. Low priority cleanup batch.

nodes.label:
🧍 #15 Define Player Archetype
taxonomy
nodes.description: Design the archetype taxonomy (definitional work — human). Blocks #17.

nodes.label:
#17 Compute & display
Player Archetypes
nodes.description: Implement archetype computation and surface it in the UI. Agent-ready once taxonomy exists.

nodes.label:
#5 Saved Teams comparison
view (Public Surface)
nodes.description: Compare Saved Teams on the public surface. Agent-ready.

nodes.label:
#102 Compare two Builds /
Saved Teams side by side (P3)
nodes.description: Side-by-side Build comparison in the Lab. Needs triage; overlaps #5 — likely one comparison surface serves both.

nodes.label:
#12 Redo live tips system
(Eval Version Publishing)
nodes.description: Rebuild the live tips system under the Evaluation Version Publishing milestone. Agent-ready.

nodes.label:
🧍 #107 VALUE CURRENCY (epic)
price players by skill
nodes.description: Epic. IRL salary makes the standard RuleSet a solved puzzle — Wemby is a top-3 skillset at $13.4M. Replace contract dollars with skill-derived prices: rank-pair players by an `overall` score against the real NBA salary curve. Legends get ladder prices too; the rookie-scale patch dies.

nodes.label:
#112 ball_security formula
is stale (P1)
nodes.description: The composite doesn't factor `steady_hand` — went stale across skill renames. Luka reads 0.0 ball security. Blocks weight calibration.

nodes.label:
🧍 #114 None tier scores 0.0
(P1)
nodes.description: A `None` tier scores 0.0 = 'worst in the league', not 'doesn't do this'. Every guard — Shai included — takes automatic zeros on pnr_screener and both rebounding axes. Structural penalty for being a guard; inflates bigs.

nodes.label:
🧍 #113 steady_hand thresholds
(P2)
nodes.description: Luka rates `None` at steady_hand. Threshold retune via the calibration API, never a migration.

nodes.label:
🧍 #108 Weighted `overall`
from composites (P1)
nodes.description: One 0-100 score per player from weighted percentile composites. 7 of 14 axes reward size; only 2 reward creation, so equal weights float rebounding bigs. Creation-first weights move the Ringer top 10 from 5/10 to 8/10 inside the top 15. Convexity was tried and failed.

nodes.label:
🧍 #115 Brunson 31st, Edwards 18th
(P1)
nodes.description: Ringer has them 5th and 6th. Brunson carries FIVE zeros incl. 0.0 on BOTH defensive axes. Elite creation guards are understated — sharpest test of whether the weights are right.

nodes.label:
#109 Rank-pair price ladder
→ value_price (P1)
nodes.description: Sort players by `overall`, sort real salaries desc, pair them. NBA's own pay curve becomes the price ladder — no curve to tune, prices stay in dollars. OPEN: how legends sit above the top rung.

nodes.label:
🧍 #110 RuleSet `currency` flag
(P1)
nodes.description: rules_json.currency: market | value. Builder reads value_price under `value`. Cap, gauge, and picker filter keep working since units stay dollars.

nodes.label:
🧍 #111 Flip standard; retire
rookie-scale rule (P1)
nodes.description: The payoff. standard goes to value currency, flat legend_salary dies, the 2-rookie-scale-contract patch is deleted. Verify roster diversity actually improved.

edges.label: taxonomy first
edges.description: Archetype computation can't start until the taxonomy is defined.

edges.label: shapes the cache
edges.description: Decoupling narrative generation decides what the narrative cache keys and stores.

edges.label: same async pattern
edges.description: Both move Claude calls off the request path — share the background-execution mechanism.

edges.label: overlapping scope
edges.description: Both are team-comparison views; triage #102 against #5 before building either.

edges.label: straggler
edges.description: Open bug left in an otherwise-shipped milestone.

edges.label: straggler
edges.description: Open bug left in an otherwise-shipped milestone.

edges.label: straggler
edges.description: Open feature left in an otherwise-shipped milestone.
